caption: An older man with white hair and a beard, wearing a white Nehru vest over a light-colored long-sleeved shirt, stands behind a white podium delivering a speech. He is positioned against a textured, greyish-green wall featuring geometric, block-like patterns. To his sides are tall, narrow glass vases containing slender branches and small red flowers. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. As the sequence progresses, the man uses various hand gestures to emphasize his points; he begins with both arms slightly extended, then raises his left hand, followed by gesturing with his right hand, and finally resting his arms by his sides. Throughout the clip, he maintains a focused expression, speaking toward an audience that remains off-screen. No text or logos are visible in the frames.
